_meta.description: Preset agent list: DUMMY (Ellen copy, game-validated) plus the Phase 5 anomaly roster. Phase 5 agents' stats are stored as published (see sources.md Phase 5 caveat: some tables may already include core bonuses - panel-check before trusting; Evelyn's ATK was corrected to raw 779 = 854 - 75).
_meta.conventions: Percent stats are fractions (0.24 = 24%). 'core_skill_bonuses' are the max-rank (F) core enhancement stat boosts; base_atk there is FLAT base ATK added to the agent's own base (it scales with ATK%). 'default_engine' is a key into data/engines.json — engines are a separate database so builds can swap them freely. Optional 'core_passive' and 'mindscapes' ('1'..'6') document the agent's kit: entries WITH an 'effects' list are modeled conditionals (kinds: crit_rate, crit_dmg, dmg_bonus, res_shred, dmg_taken, flat_atk, atk_pct, daze_bonus, anomaly_buff, disorder_mult_add, anomaly_proficiency; value per stack; max_stacks 1 = on/off checkbox), asked at runtime. Effect gates: 'skill_tag' limits an effect to that damage type; 'modes' limits it to calculation modes (direct/anomaly/disorder/vortex; absent = all); 'element' limits it to damage dealt as that element (an effect explicitly listing a disorder/vortex mode skips the element check there, since those bursts deal another element by design; effects without 'modes' stay element-checked everywhere). 'anomaly_buff' joins the separate Anomaly/Disorder Buff Multiplier bracket; 'disorder_mult_add' adds to the Disorder/Vortex burst base multiplier; 'anomaly_proficiency' is flat AP. PROJECT CONVENTION: only mindscapes that buff stats/DMG or debuff the enemy are modeled; motion-value/energy/QoL mindscapes are documented with a note but never modeled (the user enters multipliers manually).

core_passive.name: Stealthy Paws
core_passive.note: When her Dodge Counter or Quick Assist hits an enemy, DMG +60% for 6s (max core rank F). CONFIRMED in-game 2026-07-02: additive in the DMG% bracket (validation #3).

additional_ability.name: Catwalk
additional_ability.note: Requires a teammate sharing her Attribute (physical) or Faction (Cunning Hares). After any squad member inflicts Assault, her next EX Special Attack deals +35% DMG per stack (max 2) - only applies when the damage type is EX Special Attack. Verified 2026-07-03 (Game8).

1.name: Bird Hunter
1.note: Back attacks ignore 16% of the target's Physical RES; while the enemy is Stunned, ALL her attacks count as back attacks (also satisfies Steel Cushion's back-attack buff).

2.name: Cat & Mouse
2.note: Energy Generation Rate +25% while only one enemy is on the field - no damage-formula effect, not modeled.

3.name: Curious Left Tail
3.note: Basic Attack / Dodge / Assist / Special / Chain Attack Lv. +2 - motion values only; enter the higher multipliers manually (project convention: MV mindscapes are never modeled).

4.name: Sharpen Claws
4.note: Using her EX Special Attack grants +7% CRIT Rate for 15s, stacking up to 2 times (durations tracked separately).

5.name: Lucky Right Tail
5.note: Basic Attack / Dodge / Assist / Special / Chain Attack Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

6.name: Predator Lineage
6.note: Launching a Chain Attack or Ultimate grants +18% CRIT DMG, stacking up to 3 times; expires out of combat.

zhao.name: Zhao

core_passive.name: Ideal Colleague: self CRIT from HP
core_passive.note: SELF-ONLY (validation #4): +1.4% CRIT Rate per 1,000 initial Max HP, always active on her stat sheet. Only matters when Zhao is the attacker - enter her panel Max HP.

1.name: Righteous Verdict
1.note: Squad-wide 15% Attribute RES ignore on switching out - includes her own attacks. Same effect as her 'M1: squad RES ignore' team buff: never apply both at once.

2.name: Krampus Senior
2.note: Self part: when she recovers HP, HER ATK +20% for 50s (the squad's +15% is the 'M2: squad ATK%' team buff). Panel ATK% bracket assumed (validation #4 analogy).

3.name: Frostveil Edge
3.note: Basic/Dodge/Assist/Special/Chain Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

4.name: Quick as a Hare
4.note: Her Ultimate / Chain Attack / Basic (Final Verdict) gain +40% CRIT DMG - applies when the hit's damage type matches. The +250 Decibels part is resource-only.

5.name: Fuzzy Listener
5.note: Basic/Dodge/Assist/Special/Chain Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

6.name: No Value Has Its Own Value
6.note: Core passive CRIT buff x1.25: +0.35% extra CRIT Rate per 1,000 initial Max HP ON TOP of the base 1.4% - check together with the core passive. The charged Basic DMG x1.40 part is motion value, not modeled.

team_buffs.name: Ether Veil: squad ATK
team_buffs.note: While within an Ether Veil (core passive, max rank): all squad members' ATK +1,000 flat for 50s. CONFIRMED in-game 2026-07-03 (validation #4): added after the panel ATK bracket.

team_buffs.name: Additional Ability: squad DMG (HP-scaled)
team_buffs.note: Needs an Attack/Anomaly/Support squadmate. While within an Ether Veil: squad DMG +10%; +1% per 400 initial Max HP above 15,000, capped at +40% (reached at 27,000 HP).

team_buffs.name: M1: squad RES ignore
team_buffs.note: Requires Zhao at Mindscape 1 (Righteous Verdict). When she switches out (quick assists count), all squad members' DMG ignores 15% of the target's Attribute RES for 50s - effectively always up. CONFIRMED in-game 2026-07-03 (validation #5: explained the +12.9% popup surplus to 0.01%).

team_buffs.name: M2: squad ATK%
team_buffs.note: Requires Zhao at Mindscape 2 (Krampus Senior). When she recovers HP: OTHER squad members' ATK +15% for 50s (her own +20% is self-only). Joins the panel ATK% bracket by analogy with her signature engine (validation #4) - not yet popup-checked.

zhao._note: Support entry (verified 2026-07-03, Game8/BlueStacks). Squad Max HP +5% not modeled (no damage effect). Her HP-scaled CRIT Rate (1.4%/1000 HP) is SELF-ONLY, not squad-wide - community sources misread it; corrected by in-game panel check 2026-07-03 (validation #4). Core stat boosts not modeled - she is not intended as the on-field attacker. AM/AP from Game8. CONVENTION: support mindscapes with TEAM-facing damage effects are modeled as extra team_buffs entries named 'M<level>: ...' (relevance clause applies; the user only checks what their copy has unlocked). Her full kit incl. self-only mindscapes (M4 tag-gated CRIT DMG, M6 core-CRIT x1.25) is modeled under 'mindscapes'/'core_passive' for when SHE is the attacker (off-field damage feature); M3/M5 are motion values (not modeled). Her M1/M2 exist both as mindscapes (attacker role) and team_buffs (support role) - never apply both at once.

dialyn.name: Dialyn

1.name: Boundless Hospitality
1.note: During Overwhelmingly Positive: everyone (incl. her own attacks) ignores 15% All-Attribute RES. Same effect as her M1 team buff: never apply both at once. Positive Reviews +16% is resource-only.

2.name: 24/7 Hotline
2.note: Enemy debuff on Malicious Complaint targets: +15% DMG taken (bracket PROVISIONAL) and stunned +10% Stun DMG Multiplier - applies to her own attacks too. Same effect as her M2 team buff: never apply both at once.

3.name: Call from the Hollow
3.note: Skill Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

4.name: The Past Never Fades
4.note: During Overwhelmingly Positive: HER ATK +500 flat (self-only; added after the panel bracket like Zhao's flat, validation #4). The 20-Energy part is resource-only.

5.name: Lies
5.note: Skill Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

6.name: Truth
6.note: Aftertone: the chosen ally's attacks trigger an extra Physical hit of 480% of DIALYN's ATK - off-field damage, deferred to that feature (its own calculate() run with Dialyn as attacker).

team_buffs.name: Overwhelmingly Positive: squad DMG
team_buffs.note: Additional Ability - needs an Attack/Rupture squadmate. After her EX Special or Ultimate: squad DMG +40% for 15s. Verified 2026-07-03 (Game8).

team_buffs.name: Malicious Complaint: stunned vulnerability
team_buffs.note: EX 'Paper!' debuff: while the target is Stunned, its Stun DMG Multiplier +30% (and stun lasts +2s) - affects the Stunned columns only. One overview claimed 35%/+3s; Game8 max-rank says 30%/+2s - the in-game daze bar shows the truth (use the stun override if it differs).

team_buffs.name: M1: squad RES ignore (during Overwhelmingly Positive)
team_buffs.note: Requires Dialyn at Mindscape 1 (Boundless Hospitality). While her Overwhelmingly Positive effect is active, all characters ignore 15% of enemy All-Attribute RES. Verified 2026-07-03 (Game8) - check together with the Overwhelmingly Positive buff.

team_buffs.name: M2: DMG taken vs Malicious Complaint targets
team_buffs.note: Requires Dialyn at Mindscape 2 (24/7 Hotline). All units deal +15% DMG to targets under Malicious Complaint (modeled in the 'DMG taken' bracket - PROVISIONAL, popup-check the bracket), and stunned targets take another +10% Stun DMG Multiplier. Verified 2026-07-03 (Game8).

dialyn._note: Support/stunner entry (verified 2026-07-03, Game8). AM/AP unverified (stored 0 - do NOT use her as the attacker in anomaly modes). Core stat boosts not modeled. Her full kit incl. self-only mindscapes (M4 flat ATK during Overwhelmingly Positive) is modeled under 'mindscapes' for when SHE is the attacker; M3/M5 are motion values (not modeled). M1/M2 exist both as mindscapes (attacker role) and team_buffs (support role) - never apply both at once. M6 Truth (Aftertone: ally attacks trigger an extra Physical hit of 480% of DIALYN's ATK) is OFF-FIELD DAMAGE - deferred to that feature.

piper.name: Piper Wheel

additional_ability.name: Synced Acceleration
additional_ability.note: Requires a teammate sharing her Attribute (physical, e.g. Yuzuha) or Faction (Sons of Calydon). While Piper has 20+ stacks of Power: ALL squad members' DMG +18%. Verified 2026-07-03 (Game8 + zenless-optimizer datamine: abilityParams [20, 0.18]).

1.name: Leisure Moment
1.note: Spinning attacks have a 50% chance to grant extra Power; Power cap raised 20 -> 30 - buildup/uptime only, no damage-formula effect, not modeled.

2.name: Motivation
2.note: Downward smash (One Trillion Tons / Special / EX Special / Ultimate) rider: Physical DMG +10% plus +1% per Power stack AT HIT TIME (spin hits grant Power mid-move; cap +40% at 30 Power with M1). Enter Power as 'power_at_smash' (0 is valid: base +10% applies). Direct hits: applies when the calculated hit's damage type is Special / EX Special / Ultimate. PHYSICAL ANOMALY REACTIONS (Assault / physical Vortex / physical Disorder): the rider enters the snapshot of the physical anomaly Piper builds, so it applies in anomaly/disorder/vortex modes (element gate waived in disorder/vortex - those deal physical on her behalf; Disorder included for future physical-Disorder testing). Mechanic discovery #3, CONFIRMED in-game 2026-07-04: bare-build Assault +10.0% exact at 0 Power. Modeled at full value within the BUFFED buildup share (assumes her smashes dominate the gauge, Piper's standard loop); the results range's unbuffed floor covers smash-share/uptime dilution; use CLI buildup segments for exact shares.

3.name: Truck Expert
3.note: Basic Attack / Dodge / Assist / Special / Chain Attack Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled (project convention).

4.name: Refined Techniques
4.note: When a squad member inflicts an Attribute Anomaly, Piper recovers 20 Energy (once per 30s) - resource only, not modeled.

5.name: Personal Hobbies
5.note: Basic Attack / Dodge / Assist / Special / Chain Attack Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

6.name: Mild Excitement
6.note: EX Special: Engine Spin duration +2s and Power duration +4s - uptime only, not modeled.

team_buffs.name: Synced Acceleration: squad DMG
team_buffs.note: Her Additional Ability. When a squadmate shares Piper's Attribute (physical) or Faction (Sons of Calydon) - e.g. Yuzuha is physical - and Piper holds 20+ Power: ALL squad members' DMG +18%. Applies when Piper is OFF-FIELD supporting another on-field agent (e.g. Velina's Ablooms / Vortex). Same effect as her attacker-role 'Synced Acceleration' additional ability: never apply both at once.

piper._note: Kit completed 2026-07-03 (Game8 + zenless-optimizer datamine). Core passive (Power: Physical Anomaly Buildup Rate +4%/stack at rank F, 20 stacks) affects buildup SPEED only, never proc damage - documented here, no modeled core_passive. Her Assault proc was game-validated 2026-07-02 (calibration #1: 30,416 exact). Synced Acceleration exists as BOTH the on-field additional_ability (Piper attacking) and a team_buff (Piper off-field supporting another DPS) - never apply both at once.

yuzuha.name: Yuzuha (Ukinami Yuzuha)

core_passive.name: Whimsical Wonder: Tanuki Wish (self)
core_passive.note: Self part of Tanuki Wish when SHE is the attacker: flat ATK = 40% of her initial ATK (cap 1,200 at max core; full at 3,000 panel ATK) + DMG +15% for 40s after her EX Special / Ultimate hits. Same effect as her 'Tanuki Wish' team buff: never apply both at once. Enter HER panel ATK as 'initial_atk'.

1.name: Lucky Constitution
1.note: Energy on entry (resource, not modeled); Sweet Scare enemies -10% All-Attribute RES and Additional Ability buff x1.3 - both team-facing, modeled as the 'M1: ...' team buffs (apply them there even when she attacks herself).

2.name: Full of Colorful Company
2.note: Squad DMG +15% and Anomaly Buildup Rate +15% for 40s on her EX Special / Ultimate hit - team-facing, modeled as the 'M2: squad DMG' team buff (buildup part affects buildup speed only, not modeled). Forced Chain Attack part is QoL.

3.name: Fairytale of the Haunted City
3.note: Basic Attack / Dodge / Assist / Special / Chain Attack Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

4.name: Falling Magic
4.note: Her Assist Follow-Ups deal +30% DMG (applies when the calculated hit is an Assist Follow-Up); the Anomaly Buildup Rate +20% part affects buildup only, and the Quick Assist trigger is QoL - not modeled.

5.name: Dreams of a Fading Winter
5.note: Basic Attack / Dodge / Assist / Special / Chain Attack Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

6.name: Put Down Roots
6.note: Charged Assist Follow-Up fires up to 3 extra shells of 300% ATK Physical DMG each - OFF-FIELD DAMAGE, deferred to that feature (own calculate() run with Yuzuha as attacker). The squad Disorder-multiplier part (+105%/stack, max 3) is modeled as the 'M6: squad Disorder base-mult' team buff.

team_buffs.name: Tanuki Wish: squad ATK + DMG
team_buffs.note: Core passive, max rank: after her EX Special / Ultimate hits, ALL squad members gain flat ATK = 40% of YUZUHA's initial ATK (cap 1,200; full at 3,000 panel ATK) and DMG +15% for 40s. Enter HER panel ATK as 'initial_atk'. Flat ATK added after the panel bracket (Zhao analogy, validation #4) - not yet popup-checked. Verified 2026-07-03 (Game8/Icy Veins + datamine coreParams).

team_buffs.name: Additional Ability: squad Anomaly & Disorder DMG (AM-scaled)
team_buffs.note: The More the Merrier - needs an Anomaly squadmate or another Spook Shack member, and Tanuki Wish up. Per point of HER Anomaly Mastery over 100: Attribute Anomaly DMG and Disorder DMG +0.2%, cap 20% (full at 200 AM). Enter HER total AM as 'anomaly_mastery' (incl. Metanukimorphosis +30 when its condition is up). Joins the separate Anomaly/Disorder Buff Multiplier bracket (zenless-optimizer bracket - PROVISIONAL); does NOT buff Vortex (datamine gates it to anomaly/disorder damage). The Anomaly Buildup Rate half affects buildup speed only - not modeled.

team_buffs.name: M1: Sweet Scare RES shred
team_buffs.note: Requires Yuzuha at Mindscape 1. Enemies in the Sweet Scare state (her EX Special debuff): All-Attribute RES -10%. Verified 2026-07-03 (Game8/Icy Veins + datamine).

team_buffs.name: M1: Additional Ability boost (x1.3)
team_buffs.note: Requires Yuzuha at Mindscape 1. Her Additional Ability buff is raised to 130% of its value - modeled as the additive extra (+0.06%/AM point, cap +6%): check TOGETHER with the Additional Ability buff, with the same 'anomaly_mastery' input.

team_buffs.name: M2: squad DMG
team_buffs.note: Requires Yuzuha at Mindscape 2 (Full of Colorful Company). After her EX Special / Ultimate hits: all squad members' DMG +15% for 40s (the Anomaly Buildup Rate +15% affects buildup only - not modeled).

team_buffs.name: M6: squad Disorder base-mult
team_buffs.note: Requires Yuzuha at Mindscape 6 (Put Down Roots). When her M6 shells hit Sweet Scare enemies: squad Disorder DMG Multiplier +105% per stack for 40s, up to 3 stacks - ADDS to the Disorder/Vortex burst base multiplier (datamine: addl_disorder_, applies to Vortex too). PROVISIONAL until calibrated.

yuzuha._note: Support entry (added 2026-07-03: Game8 + Icy Veins + zenless-optimizer datamine; stats datamine-derived: HP 710+2436+59x96.33=8829, ATK 109+195+59x6.4272=683, DEF 612, AM 88, AP 93 - not yet panel-checked in-game). Core stat boosts (max: +75 base ATK, +36 AM) NOT folded into the stored stats: she is a support; her buffs take her PANEL values as scaling inputs instead, which already include them. Sugar Points are resource-only. Her M1/M2/M6 team-facing parts are 'M<level>: ...' team_buffs per the Zhao convention; core Tanuki Wish exists as core_passive (attacker role) AND team buff (support role) - never apply both at once.

yanagi.name: Tsukishiro Yanagi

core_passive.name: Lunar Eclipse + Stances (on-field)
core_passive.note: Her on-field self buffs, bundled (toggle when Yanagi is the attacker): (1) Lunar Eclipse - after her EX Special, when ANY squad member applies Disorder: Disorder DMG multiplier +250% (max core) for 15s + Electric DMG +20% on her EX hit; (2) STANCES from Basic Attack Tsukuyomi Kagura - Jougen stance Electric DMG +10%, Kagen stance PEN Ratio +10%; she retains the previous stance's bonus for 8s after switching, so both are effectively up in rotation. Net when on-field: Electric DMG +30%, PEN Ratio +10%, and Disorder +250% in Disorder mode. The Disorder part is also a 'Lunar Eclipse: squad ...' team buff (support role) - never apply both at once. PROVISIONAL until Disorder calibration.

1.name: Know Thy Self, Know Thy Enemy
1.note: Clarity stacks (max 3) grant AP / buildup on being hit - resource/buildup mechanic, not a clean damage toggle; not modeled (enter the AP as external if measuring).

2.name: Outstanding Adaptability
2.note: EX Special rapid-thrust Electric Anomaly Buildup +20% and extra thrusts - buildup/energy only, not modeled.

3.name: Tsukishiro Style Management
3.note: Basic / Dodge / Assist / Special / Chain Attack Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

4.name: Chessmaster
4.note: When Yanagi inflicts Attribute Anomaly DMG: the enemy is Exposed for 15s; ALL attacks on Exposed enemies gain +16% PEN Ratio. Squad-wide enemy debuff - modeled as the 'M4: squad PEN Ratio vs Exposed' team buff too: never apply both at once.

5.name: Other Mother
5.note: Basic / Dodge / Assist / Special / Chain Attack Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

6.name: Inhuman Blood
6.note: Shinrabanshou state extended to 30s; while active, EX Special Attack DMG +20% (applies when the calculated hit is an EX Special). The max additional-DMG-multiplier-increase part is a Polarity Disorder cap, not modeled here.

team_buffs.name: Lunar Eclipse: squad Disorder mult +250%
team_buffs.note: Core passive, max core. After Yanagi's EX Special, when any squad member applies Disorder: squad Disorder DMG multiplier +250% for 15s. Applies when she is OFF-FIELD amplifying a teammate's Disorder. Same effect as her core_passive: never apply both at once. HUGE and PROVISIONAL until Disorder calibration.

team_buffs.name: M4: squad PEN Ratio vs Exposed
team_buffs.note: Requires Yanagi at Mindscape 4 (Chessmaster). All squad members gain +16% PEN Ratio against enemies she has Exposed (via inflicting Attribute Anomaly DMG). Same as her M4 mindscape: never apply both at once.

yanagi._note: Anomaly attacker (Team 3, added 2026-07-04, zenless-optimizer datamine: HP 710+... = 7789, ATK 798, DEF 613, AM 112, AP 114; max core ATK+75 AM+36). POLARITY DISORDER is her main DMG source - see the anomaly_plan / calc note: her downward thrust on an anomalous enemy triggers Polarity Disorder = 15% of a normal Disorder's DMG (+ a flat ~27.25% of her AP term at max skill) and does NOT consume the anomaly, so it repeats many times. To calc: run Disorder mode (electric), apply her core +250% mult and Timeweaver +25%, then take 15% per trigger. M1/M2/M3/M5 not modeled (buildup/MV). Disorder numbers PROVISIONAL until in-game calibration.

vivian.name: Vivian Banshee

additional_ability.name: Prophetic Tears
additional_ability.note: Needs an Anomaly squadmate or one sharing her attribute (ether). Squad Corruption DMG and Corruption's Disorder DMG +12% (Buff Multiplier bracket). The Featherbloom-on-teammate-anomaly part drives her Abloom (off-field damage feature, deferred). PROVISIONAL.

1.name: Walking Into the Orchard in Spring
1.note: Targets under Vivian's Prophecy take +16% Attribute Anomaly DMG and Disorder DMG (enemy debuff, DMG-taken bracket). The Guard/Flight Feather part is resource-only.

2.name: Stormy Night, Stormy Night
2.note: Ether Anomaly Buildup +25% (buildup, not modeled); Abloom's AP benefit raised to 130% (enter 1.3x in the Abloom note calc); and 15% All-Attribute RES ignore (modeled). Verified 2026-07-04 (datamine).

3.name: Another and the Same
3.note: Basic / Dodge / Assist / Special / Chain Attack Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

4.name: The Wind Between the Reeds
4.note: Her Featherbloom / Fluttering Frock basics always CRIT (irrelevant to anomalies) and grant +12% ATK for 12s - effectively always up in her rotation. Panel ATK% bracket assumed.

5.name: Sonnet
5.note: Basic / Dodge / Assist / Special / Chain Attack Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

6.name: Vivian
6.note: Vivian's Ether DMG +40%. The extra Flight Feather / Abloom-trigger parts are resource/off-field damage.

team_buffs.name: Prophetic Tears: squad Corruption & Disorder DMG
team_buffs.note: Her Additional Ability as a support: squad Corruption DMG and Corruption Disorder DMG +12%. Same as her attacker-role additional_ability: never apply both at once.

team_buffs.name: M1: Prophecy targets take +16% Anomaly/Disorder DMG
team_buffs.note: Requires Vivian at Mindscape 1. Enemies under her Prophecy take +16% Anomaly/Disorder DMG from ALL squad members. Same as her M1 mindscape: never apply both at once.

vivian._note:
Ether anomaly attacker (Team 3, added 2026-07-04, zenless-optimizer datamine: HP 7674 / ATK 806 / DEF 607, AM 108, AP 118; max core ATK+75 AM+36). Her Prophecy (Ether DMG 55% ATK / 0.55s) is off-field DoT (deferred). M3/M5 not modeled. Anomaly/Abloom numbers PROVISIONAL until in-game calibration.

ABLOOM CALC (her signature; AP-SCALING, unlike Velina's fixed MV): Featherbloom on an anomalous target deals a SEPARATE instance = (MV% per 10 AP) x (the ORIGINAL anomaly's per-proc DMG). MV per element at max core: Ether 6.15 / Electric 3.2 / Fire 8 / Physical 0.75 / Ice 1.08 / Wind 0.32 (x1.3 with her M2). Recipe - run ANOMALY mode as the anomaly's element with the multiplier OVERRIDE = anomaly_base_mult x (MV/100) x (AP/10). Base mults: Corruption(ether) 0.625, Shock(electric) 1.25, Burn(fire) 0.50, Assault(physical) 7.13, Shatter(ice) 5.0, Windswept(wind) 12.5. EXAMPLE - Ether Corruption, Vivian AP 446: override = 0.625 x 0.0615 x 44.6 = 1.714 (the Abloom is ~2.74x the Corruption at that AP). Note: the 'per 10 AP' scales with VIVIAN's AP; the 'original anomaly DMG' uses whoever applied it (usually Vivian's own Corruption, so same AP). M2's x1.3 and its 15% RES ignore are separate toggles.

rina.name: Alexandrina Sebastiane (Rina)

core_passive.name: Mini Destruction Partner (self)
core_passive.note: Self note: the squad PEN Ratio buff is her support role (see team_buffs). Her own PEN Ratio +14.4% core is folded into core_skill_bonuses. This entry keeps her Additional Ability's Electric DMG +10% available when SHE is the attacker (off-field damage feature) - normally she is a support (use team_buffs).

team_buffs.name: Mini Destruction Partner: squad PEN Ratio
team_buffs.note: Core passive, max core. While Drusilla/Anastella are attacking: ALL squad members' PEN Ratio increases by 25% of RINA's PEN Ratio + 12%, capped at +30% (reached at 72% Rina PEN). Enter HER panel PEN Ratio as 'pen_ratio' (fraction, e.g. 0.24 -> +18%). Feeds the DEF zone. Verified 2026-07-04 (datamine coreParams [0.25, 0.12, 0.30]); 0.001 step approximates the linear 0.25x slope.

team_buffs.name: M1: PEN Ratio buff x1.3 (extra +30%)
team_buffs.note: Requires Rina at Mindscape 1 (Dance Duet). The Core Passive PEN Ratio buff for nearby characters is raised to 130% of its value (cap 30% -> 39%). Modeled as the EXTRA +30% (0.3 x the base buff, cap +9%): check TOGETHER with the core PEN buff, same 'pen_ratio' input. In-game 2026-07-05: gave 38.48% total (= 29.6% base x 1.3), confirmed by the user. Verified (datamine mindscapeParams M1 [5.5, 1.3]).

team_buffs.name: Banquet of Perfection: squad Electric DMG
team_buffs.note: Additional Ability - needs a squadmate sharing her Attribute (electric) or Faction (Victoria Housekeeping). While a Shocked enemy is on the field: all squad members' Electric DMG +10% (also extends Shock +3s - buildup). Verified 2026-07-04 (datamine abilityParams [3, 0.10]).

team_buffs.name: M2: Rina DMG +15% (self)
team_buffs.note: Requires Rina at Mindscape 2. When she becomes the active character: HER DMG +15% for 12s (once/18s). SELF-ONLY - only relevant if she is the attacker (off-field damage). Do not apply to the on-field DPS.

team_buffs.name: M6: squad Electric DMG +15%
team_buffs.note: Requires Rina at Mindscape 6. Her EX Special / Chain / Ultimate hit: ALL squad members' Electric DMG +15% for 8s. Verified 2026-07-04 (datamine mindscapeParams M6 [0.15, 8]).

rina._note: Electric support (Team 3, added 2026-07-04, zenless-optimizer datamine: HP 8609 / ATK 642 / DEF 601, Impact 83, AM 93, AP 92; max core ATK+75, PEN Ratio+14.4%). Her value is the squad PEN Ratio buff (scales with her own PEN) + Electric DMG buffs. Modeled as team_buffs (support role); M2 is self-only. Bangboo-summon mechanics (Drusilla/Anastella deployment) are the trigger conditions - the user toggles what's active. M1/M3/M4/M5 not modeled (uptime/energy/MV). PEN Ratio +14.4% core folded into core_skill_bonuses. Not yet panel-checked in-game.

velina.name: Velina Airgid

core_passive.name: Breeze in Bloom: Energy Regen scaling
core_passive.note: Per 0.01 initial Energy Regen above 1.2: DMG +0.21%, cap +35% (and AM +0.5, cap +84 - buildup only, not modeled). Enter her panel Energy Regen as 'initial_energy_regen' (e.g. 1.92 with Joyau Dore's +60%). Effectively always active. The Windbite part (consuming 2 points: that Vortex's base multiplier +150% at max core) is a per-burst input - enter it as the additive Vortex-mult increase in Vortex mode. Cyclone-explosion ABLOOMS: a SEPARATE wind-anomaly instance at its OWN multiplier - Condensed 145% / Sweeping 255% at max core (datamine coreParams). The stated % IS the anomaly multiplier (like Windswept is 1250%), NOT a scale on 12.5 - run wind Anomaly mode with the multiplier OVERRIDE set to 145 / 255. CONFIRMED in-game 2026-07-04 (calibration #5: Ultimate Abloom = 6.80/12.5 of the Windswept popup, exact).

additional_ability.name: Tea Party Etiquette
additional_ability.note: Needs an Anomaly squadmate or one sharing her attribute (wind). Windswept and Vortex DMG +10% (separate Buff Multiplier bracket, zenless-optimizer - PROVISIONAL). Also: her Ultimate's heavy attack on a Wind-anomalous enemy triggers an ABLOOM at 680% (a separate wind-anomaly instance; run wind Anomaly mode with the multiplier OVERRIDE set to 680 - the % IS the multiplier, not a scale on 12.5); Sweeping Cyclone's extra Anomaly-Buildup-RES shred / Daze / buildup parts affect buildup only - not modeled.

1.name: Orderly Elegance
1.note: When she triggers Vortex: ignores 20% of the target's All-Attribute RES; squad Windswept DMG ignores 20% Wind RES (the wind Anomaly-mode entry). Sweeping Cyclone +20% Daze affects buildup only - not modeled.

2.name: Saturation Project
2.note: The Additional Ability's Windswept/Vortex DMG increase is raised by a further +15% (check together with Tea Party Etiquette). Windswept now also grants Windbite (5s cooldown) and tinted cyclones accumulate the tinted attribute's buildup - resource/buildup, not modeled.

3.name: Conquest by Etiquette
3.note: Basic Attack / Dodge / Assist / Special / Chain Attack Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

4.name: Tea Party Tribunal
4.note: Using an EX Special Attack: her ATK +15% for 40s (repeated triggers refresh) - effectively always up in rotation. Panel ATK% bracket assumed (validation #4 analogy) - not yet popup-checked.

5.name: Death Witch
5.note: Basic Attack / Dodge / Assist / Special / Chain Attack Lv. +2 - motion values only, not modeled.

6.name: Chief Angel
6.note: Windbite refund on consumption (6s cooldown) and +20% Wind Anomaly Buildup - resource/buildup, not modeled. Re-applying Windswept over an active one: the new burst's DMG +2.5% per remaining second, cap +40% - this SCALES the Windswept base, so use the multiplier override at 12.5 x up to 1.40 = up to 1750 (1750%) in wind Anomaly mode.

team_buffs.name: Tea Party Etiquette: squad Windswept & Vortex DMG
team_buffs.note: Her Additional Ability. When a teammate triggers a Vortex (or deals Windswept DMG): +10% to that Vortex/Windswept in the Anomaly/Disorder Buff Multiplier bracket. Applies when SHE is off-field enabling a teammate's reaction - e.g. Piper's physical Vortex. Same effect as her attacker-role 'Tea Party Etiquette' additional ability: never apply both at once. HYBRID-model assumption (the infused-anomaly carrier scales the base, Velina amplifies) - PROVISIONAL until an in-game Vortex calibration (anomaly_plan.md 5e).

team_buffs.name: M1: squad Vortex/Windswept RES ignore
team_buffs.note: Requires Velina at Mindscape 1 (Orderly Elegance). The triggered Vortex ignores 20% of the target's All-Attribute RES; squad Windswept DMG ignores 20% Wind RES. Same as her attacker-role M1: never apply both at once.

team_buffs.name: M2: squad Windswept/Vortex DMG
team_buffs.note: Requires Velina at Mindscape 2 (Saturation Project). Raises the Windswept/Vortex DMG increase by a further +15% (check together with the Tea Party Etiquette team buff). Same as her attacker-role M2: never apply both at once.

team_buffs.name: Windbite: enhanced Vortex base-mult
team_buffs.note: When Velina consumes 2 Windbite to enhance a Vortex: that Vortex's base DMG multiplier +150% at max core (datamine coreParams). SITUATIONAL - only the enhanced Vortex in her loop (roughly every other Vortex), so toggle it ONLY when measuring that specific hit. Adds to the Vortex burst base multiplier.

velina._note: Kit completed 2026-07-03 (Game8 + Icy Veins + zenless-optimizer datamine; conflicts resolved by the datamine at max core: Windbite +150% NOT Game8's 159%, Ablooms 145%/255%, Chromatic Tint shreds Anomaly BUILDUP RES not damage RES). Stats confirmed by datamine (ATK 126+224+59x7.586=797). ABLOOM = a SEPARATE wind-anomaly instance (its own popup) at its OWN multiplier (cyclones 145%/255%, Ultimate 680%): the stated % IS the anomaly multiplier, NOT a scale on the 12.5 Windswept base - calculate as wind Anomaly mode with the multiplier OVERRIDE (145/255/680). CONFIRMED in-game 2026-07-04 (calibration #5). VORTEX ROLE (added 2026-07-04): a physical/other-element Vortex is dealt as the INFUSED anomaly and scales off the infused-anomaly carrier's stats (e.g. Piper) - set that agent as the on-field attacker; Velina's Windswept/Vortex AMPLIFIERS then apply via her 'team_buffs' (her ability +10%, M1 20% RES ignore, M2 +15%, Windbite +150%). Her attacker-role kit (core_passive / additional_ability / mindscapes) and her team_buffs are the SAME effects for the two roles - never apply both at once. Joyau Dore's squad AP (+60 at 2 stacks) reaches Velina herself (squad buffs apply to the wearer too, since 2026-07-04) - toggle it via the on-field engine squad-buff control. Its squad-facing Vortex/Windswept DMG stacks are NOT yet modeled as a squad buff (squad_buffs lack the anomaly_buff bracket) - enter those as external Anomaly-buff % for now. Vortex/Windswept numbers PROVISIONAL until in-game calibration (anomaly_plan.md 5e).
